achievements.description: Master any one unmastered Magic materia while having one copy of every other type of Magic Materia mastered and equipped on characters other than Yuffie and Vincent
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Summon Master
achievements.description: Master any one unmastered Summon materia while having one copy of every other type of Summon Materia mastered and equipped on characters other than Yuffie and Vincent
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Lucky Number Slevin
achievements.description: Get any character to 7777 HP in battle.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: The Needle and the Damage Done
achievements.description: Do 9999 points of damage to an enemy.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Strago's Tribute
achievements.description: Obtain every enemy skill on one materia.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Crimson Jazz
achievements.description: Defeat the Ruby Weapon.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Desert Storm
achievements.description: Defeat Ruby Weapon without the use of Knights of the Round, Absorbing, Hades, Final Attack, Countering & Mime materias or Dazers (no Lucky 7s, Cross Slash, or Game Over)
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Emerald Blues
achievements.description: Defeat the Emerald Weapon.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Ocean Power
achievements.description: Defeat Emerald Weapon without the use of Underwater, Knights of the Round, Absorbing, Final Attack, Countering & Mime materias (no Lucky 7s, Game Over, or ultimate weapons)
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Around the World
achievements.description: Complete the Kalm Traveler quest.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Black Wing Metamorphosis
achievements.description: Defeat both forms of Sephiroth at full power without using Knights of the Round or Game Over.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: Duel of the Blades
achievements.description: Complete the game.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: When the Planet Fights Back
achievements.description: Beat the game with nobody surpassing level 35.
achievements.author: FBernkastelKues

achievements.title: A Thorough First Mission
achievements.description: Obtain all the items in the #1 Reactor and the surrounding streets
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Above and Below the Plate
achievements.description: Obtain all the items of Sector 5
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: The Wonders of the Base
achievements.description: Obtain all the items of the Sector 7 Slums and the Train Graveyard
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Deep in the Decadent Backyard
achievements.description: Obtain all the items of Sector 6
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: On the Outskirts
achievements.description: Obtain all the items of Kalm, the Chocobo Farm, and the Mythril Mine
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Shinra Inc
achievements.description: Obtain all the items in the Shinra Headquarters, the surrounding grounds, and the Midgar revisit
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Of Shores And Sea
achievements.description: Obtain all the treasure of Junon, the Reactor, the Gelnika, and the Cargo Ship
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Coal and Gold Miner
achievements.description: Obtain all the treasure of Costa Del Sol, Mt. Corel, North Corel, and the Gold Saucer
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Forestry and Mountain Travel
achievements.description: Obtain all the treasure of Gongaga, Cosmo Canyon, and the Gi Cave
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Nibel Visitors
achievements.description: Obtain all the treasure of Nibelheim, Shinra Mansion, Mt. Nibel, and Rocket Town
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Ancient and Leviathan Goods
achievements.description: Obtain all the treasure of Wutai and its area, the Temple of the Ancients, and Mideel (includes enemy chests)
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: At the Heart of Gaea
achievements.description: Obtain all the treasure of the Corel Valley, the Forgotten City, the Icicle Inn, and the Gaea Cliffs
achievements.author: Ghal416

achievements.title: Deep Impact
achievements.description: Obtain all the treasure of the Whirlwind Maze and the Northern Crater
achievements.author: Ghal416
